group_1.narration: ―Kagome―@Jeanne La Pucelle was the one who liberated@the town of Orleans from England and@led the crowning of the King of France.

group_1.progressNarration: [textBlack:It's been almost 10 years@since her passing in 1440...]
[textBlack:According to Torte,@there are hardly any people@left who remember Jeanne.]
[textBlack:It's not just that she has been forgotten,@but it's as if she "never existed"@in the first place...]

group_1.textRight: I was born after La Pucelle passed away.
But my mother remembers her@and always told me her story.
She defeated an evil Witch and reclaimed France.
She was an amazing Magical Girl...

group_1.textLeft: Ah, right...! I wanted to ask you about that.
Was Jeanne d'Arc really a Magical Girl?

group_1.textRight: It seems so... Are you interested in Magical Girls?

group_1.textLeft: Yeah...
I'm not a Magical Girl myself,@but I'm researching about them.

group_1.textRight: Research... Like recording them?@With that future pen?

group_1.textLeft: Yeah... It's not always like that, though.

group_1.textRight: So, you want to investigate La Pucelle too?

group_1.textLeft: Yeah... It might be challenging to conduct the@research, though.
If only I could hear stories...from people who@knew Jeanne...

group_1.textRight: Then, we're allies!
I also want to learn more about La Pucelle Jeanne!
...Speaking of which, the memories of@La Pucelle that haven't been lost
are gathered in this Ark of Feelings!

group_1.textLeft: Ah...I see.
So, you came to this place
to search for the memories of Jeanne
that exist within everyone's hearts?

group_1.textRight: Exactly!
...If we dive into the books gathered here,
we might be able to discover the memories@of people who knew La Pucelle!

group_1.textLeft: I think I'm starting to understand a little...

group_1.textRight: Your mind was the very first one I entered,@Kagome.

group_1.textLeft: ...But I've never met Jeanne d'Arc...
(Um...one, two...)
There are only six books in the Ark,@and I can't find any more.
And one of them is mine...?

group_1.textRight: Yeah... That's what's mysterious.
It felt like it came from a different era, or the future.
I thought maybe it became a book or a legend@and was passed down.
That's why I wanted to investigate about La Pucelle.

group_1.textLeft: It was properly passed down to the future,@so I knew about it too.
But for some reason...the books and records@have disappeared...

group_1.textRight: Hmm, but both you and the others you spoke with
haven't forgotten the name Jeanne, right?

group_1.textLeft: Yeah... But thinking back,
the librarian didn't seem to know about@Jeanne d'Arc herself.
It was actually something special that I@remembered her name...
So, maybe that's why my book was here?

group_1.textRight: That could be possible!

group_1.textLeft: ...So, one of those books is my inner world...
If I jump into it, can I return to my original world?

group_1.textRight: I think so, probably.

group_1.textLeft: It's a bit reassuring to know I can return anytime...

group_1.textRight: But since we're here, shall we continue the@investigation a bit longer?

group_1.textLeft: Yeah... I want to keep investigating too...

group_1.textRight: Then it's settled! Let's jump into the second book@together!

group_1.textLeft: ...What...n-now?
W...WAIT!
